final:
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we, // write enable  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory; // 16-bit memory cell  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            memory <= data_in; // Write data when we is high  
        end  
        data_out <= memory; // Always output current memory value  
    end  
endmodule
